name: template-node-hapi-backend
description: Template for Node.js backend microservice utilising the Hapi.js plugin ecosystem

scripts.docker:test: npm run lint && mkdir -p coverage && docker compose -p template-node-hapi-backend-test down -v && docker compose -f compose.yaml -f compose.test.yaml -p template-node-hapi-backend-test run --build --rm template-node-hapi-backend
scripts.docker:test:watch: docker compose -p template-node-hapi-backend-test down -v && docker compose -f compose.yaml -f compose.test.yaml -f compose.test.watch.yaml -p template-node-hapi-backend-test run --build --rm template-node-hapi-backend

author: Rana Salem (github.com/rtasalem)
